description: Failure in inputs, labels, records, schemas, pipelines, or measurement.
monitoring_focus: missingness drift data quality and provenance

description: Failure in prediction, calibration, robustness, subgroup behavior, or generalization.
monitoring_focus: error calibration drift and disaggregated performance

description: Failure from optimizing a metric that does not represent the real goal.
monitoring_focus: metric gaming reward hacking and outcome quality

description: Failure from misleading display, defaults, warnings, explanations, or uncertainty communication.
monitoring_focus: user interpretation reliance and error detection

description: Failure from human review, organizational procedure, workload, or authority gaps.
monitoring_focus: review time acceptance override and escalation

description: Failure from deployment, dependency, logging, version, API, schema, or rollback problems.
monitoring_focus: system dependencies logging and release controls

description: Failure from weak ownership, appeal, incident response, audit trail, remediation, or retirement.
